name: R2 Image Upload
description: Uploads all sourced images to Cloudflare R2 CDN and rewrites images.ts from external URLs to images.esy.com. Hotlinking external image URLs in production is prohibited.

all_of.description: TypeScript image data with all URLs pointing to images.esy.com

validations.description: images.ts must exist with R2-hosted URLs
No hotlinked Wikimedia URLs — all images must be on images.esy.com
No hotlinked Library of Congress URLs — all images must be on images.esy.com
images.ts must contain R2-hosted URLs (images.esy.com) and be typed as const
At least 5 R2-hosted image URLs must be present (photorealistic essays require substantial photography)
All R2-hosted image URLs must return HTTP 2xx — verifies upload completed successfully

required_skills.name: Image URL Extraction & R2 Upload
required_skills.reason: Agent MUST follow the R2 upload procedure in SKILL.md Step 5 and references/r2-upload.md. Run scan-hotlinked-images.mjs to generate config, then r2-migrate-flat-url-map.mjs to upload and rewrite URLs.

notes: G4.7 runs after G4.5 (Image Sourcing). G4.5 validates that external URLs are correct and reachable; G4.7 then migrates them to R2 and validates that no external URLs remain. The not_contains checks cover Wikimedia, LOC, and other common archive sources. The url_reachable check verifies the R2 URLs are live. If images-migration.json still exists after this gate, it should be deleted (ephemeral artifact).
